textByHashes.b9d107c6e887c97fd949a0a96696a1288b35272c: We are not assembled here to squabble over accounting details or the economic state of the Consortium.
textByHashes.7a02592d80aa84cf5ed8696d4584d8beaf37bc04: It is not yet clear what consequences that discovery will have on the economy.
textByHashes.9d39a5fab7254c803e9e8bbdf0e272f562b225b9: I'm too important to talk to the likes of you, leave.
textByHashes.04d720a8ed2bfb28a71281b5c619ee79b8dd5306: My secretary will deal with any inquiries you have about the Blue Opal.
textByHashes.f2363f1188f86032c6b5b54b93612c74c6e04e84: My secretary is sitting just over there, thank you.
textByHashes.b20c31794a1aa0fa15272122c8458919a6da071f: Today is not a good day, can you come back tomorrow?
textByHashes.a8fb6b872d5b95b1a826c9b5a1a285e5f4ef78f9: If you're looking for the market, it's downstairs.
textByHashes.8f8a85c1212444db7e5909824227c45141d0dcfe: Do you mind? You're blocking my view.
textByHashes.5b0af2ce23dae504d63c6c93d1e3ca31acc19db3: How did you get in here? I don't have time to talk to you!
textByHashes.7e9d37f30e386229f2bcdb6d343c2ad7b7741c79: I can't help you, go and see my secretary.
textByHashes.1471a561c9ec74ee1fac80b5b7c19af60923515e: Talk to my secretary, I don't have time to deal with you.
textByHashes.40a2cb5401e9443a4afb77b7218e39eb3abc6cfc: I told you to leave, human!
